centertext_templates: warmth moving slowly through your spine
tts_templates: with each exhale your {body_part} grows a little heavier, a little warmer, settling deeper into this quiet comfort
allow that warmth to spread slowly through your {body_part}, each breath releasing a little more of what you're holding
there is nothing to do here except feel the soft weight of your {body_part} settling, breath by breath, deeper into ease
your {body_part} knows how to let go, and with each slow exhale, it's already happening, already softening
warmth moves gently through you, and with it, every held breath becomes a slow release into deeper stillness
the quiet grows heavier, more comfortable, and your {body_part} responds by releasing a little more with each breath
